message.content:
@startuml
participant "Ship Captain" as Captain1
participant "Ship Captain" as Captain2
participant :System as System

Captain1 --> System :1 wants to check the audit trail of a given container of a given cargo manifest
System --> Captain1 :2 asks for data(cargo manifest id, container id)
Captain1 --> System :3 inserts needed data
System --> Captain1 :4 returns the audit trail in chronological order

@enduml
